name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: New: a "How to use" guide. Open it from your account menu, or the "?" button in the top bar.
It explains the app step by step with pictures, and shows only the parts for your role (staff, manager or master).
Read it in English, 中文 (Chinese) or ភាសាខ្មែរ (Khmer) — it picks your device language automatically, and remembers your choice.
